name: Old Pecan Street Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Beat with an electric mixer until well blended and smooth.
3. Stir in the chopped pecans.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes, or until set.
6. Makes one 9-inch pie.
